_method: BLIND hand-numbered FDI overlays (Opus, single-rater). Numbered by ANATOMY ONLY (arch position -> FDI quadrant/number); the answer/gt column was NEVER read during numbering. Coords are crown-center (cx,cy) in ORIGINAL image pixels. 39 LOCALIZE images from open_ended.parquet (Teeth-category "which tooth" questions). Disrupted/restored/edentulous cases carry a caveat in low_confidence.json rather than being excluded. Single-rater: no second-rater agreement measured.
